instructions: This repo is an AI documentation optimization and evaluation framework. UV workspace with two packages: agent-index (doc scanning/transformation) and agent-evals (format axis testing with 330+ gold standard tasks). Python 3.11+, pytest, TDD required.

rules.rule: All functional code must have corresponding tests - TDD is required
No hardcoded API keys, passwords, or secrets
Python functions should have type hints for parameters and returns
Test names must follow the pattern 'should_<expected_behavior>_when_<condition>' or 'test_<expected_behavior>_when_<condition>'
Functions should not exceed 50 lines - refactor into smaller units if longer

other.content: This repo is a submodule of compass-tests, focused on AI documentation optimization and format evaluation.
